__meta__.note: Exact per-match US channel assignments. Override the default FOX/FS1 + Telemundo/Universo here, keyed by match_id, as FOX & Telemundo publish the match-by-match schedule. Each value may set english_channel, spanish_channel, stream_url, english_stream, spanish_stream.
__meta__.english_rights: FOX, FS1 — free stream Tubi, Fox Sports app
__meta__.spanish_rights: Telemundo, Universo — stream Peacock, Telemundo app
